title: grindelia squarrosa var. grandiflora
intro: Grindelia squarrosa var. grandiflora, also known as Great Valley Gumweed or Large Flowered Gumweed, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Grindelia squarrosa var. grandiflora include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Grindelia squarrosa var. grandiflora is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
